build.description: Build the production controller bundle for the current OS

build:agent.description: Build the headless tether-agent daemon (release). On Linux this includes Wayland/PipeWire support (run `run setup` for libpipewire-0.3-dev)

build:server.description: Build the tether-server relay (release) to deploy on a public cloud host for relay mode

build:universal.description: Build a universal (Intel + Apple Silicon) macOS bundle

build:web.description: Type-check and build only the frontend bundle into dist/

check.description: Verify the code is correctly formatted, linted and type-checks (frontend + Rust workspace)

clean.description: Remove build artifacts (dist, node_modules, Rust target)

dev.description: Run the full Tether controller (Rust backend + Vite frontend) with hot reload

dev:agent.description: Run the headless agent from source (pass subcommands after --, e.g. run / enroll / status)

dev:web.description: Run only the Vite dev server (UI preview; Tauri APIs unavailable)

fix-appimage-icon.description: Repack built AppImages with a valid .DirIcon so file managers show the icon

install.description: Install JS dependencies and set up git hooks (husky)

lint.description: Auto-format and fix the whole codebase (Biome for JS/CSS/JSON, rustfmt for Rust)

commands: git commit package.json src-tauri/Cargo.toml src-tauri/tauri.conf.json src-tauri/Cargo.lock -m {{ shell_quote(concat('chore: release ', VAR.tag)) }}
release.description: Bump the version (major/minor/patch) across manifests, refresh Cargo.lock, commit, tag v<new>, then push so the release workflow runs

cases.linux: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev build-essential curl wget file libxdo-dev libssl-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev libxcb1-dev libxrandr-dev libxfixes-dev libdbus-1-dev libpipewire-0.3-dev libxkbcommon-dev clang freerdp3-x11

commands.default: echo 'No system setup step for {{ RUN.os }} — install the Tauri prerequisites manually: https://tauri.app/start/prerequisites/'

setup.description: Install system prerequisites (Tauri/WebKit deps) and JS dependencies

update-deps.description: Update JS dependencies to their latest versions and update Cargo crates
